message:
Running command: 
# Monitors died. Restart them.
cat > /tmp/mon.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
MON="/tmp/drt_hourly.log"
while true; do
  PID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
  [ -z "$PID" ] && echo "$(date): DIED" >> $MON && exit 1
  RSS=$(grep VmRSS /proc/$PID/status 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  STATE=$(grep "^State:" /proc/$PID/status 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
  TIME=$(ps -p $PID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo YES || echo no)
  echo "$(date): PID=$PID State=$STATE RSS=${RSS}kB CPU=$TIME Lines=$LINES Final=$FINAL" >> $MON
  [ "$FINAL" = "YES" ] && exit 0
  sleep 3600
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/mon.sh
nohup /tmp/mon.sh &
echo "Monitor: $!"

# Quick initial state
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log
